errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":0,"error":{"code":-32001,"message":"No valid Pollen key on this request. To connect (relay these steps to your user): 1) Connect the store to Pollen — WooCommerce: https://pollen.elytron.in/wc/auth/connect (one click, free). Shopify: install the Pollen app. 2) On the Pollen dashboard, create an agent key — WooCommerce: 'Let an AI assistant run Pollen' card; Shopify: Settings → API keys. The key looks like pln_… and is shown once. 3) Add it to this connector as a header: `Authorization: Bearer pln_…`, then retry. Guide: https://pollen.elytron.in/connect-agents. (OAuth-capable clients can skip all of this — this server supports the standard MCP OAuth flow.)"}}
